message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS 2018 – German General Social Survey",
      "series": "ALLBUS (German General Social Survey)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "2018",
      "geography": "Germany",
      "themes": [
        "Employment",
        "Cultural activities and participation",
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
        "Economic conditions and indicators"
      ],
      "description": "Cross-sectional survey of the German adult population covering social structure, labor market status, income, cultural activities, and attitudes on equality and social cohesion."
    },
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS Cumulation 1980–2016",
      "series": "ALLBUS (German General Social Survey)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "1980–2016",
      "geography": "Germany",
      "themes": [
        "Employment",
        "Cultural activities and participation",
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
        "Economic conditions and indicators"
      ],
      "description": "Pooled dataset of ALLBUS waves from 1980 to 2016 for time-trend analyses on employment, cultural participation, inequality, and socio-economic indicators in Germany."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2015 – Work Orientations IV",
      "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "2015",
      "geography": "International (multiple countries)",
      "themes": [
        "Employment",
        "Economic conditions and indicators"
      ],
      "description": "Comparative module focusing on work and employment relations, job satisfaction, working conditions, and labor market orientations."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2019 – Social Inequality V",
      "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "2019",
      "geography": "International (multiple countries)",
      "themes": [
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
        "Economic conditions and indicators"
      ],
      "description": "Comparative module on perceptions of social inequality, income distribution, social exclusion, fairness, and social mobility."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2007 – Leisure Time and Sports",
      "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "2007",
      "geography": "International (multiple countries)",
      "themes": [
        "Cultural activities and participation",
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion"
      ],
      "description": "Module on leisure activities, sports participation, and cultural consumption, including access and participation patterns."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2016 – Role of Government V",
      "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "2016",
      "geography": "International (multiple countries)",
      "themes": [
        "Economic conditions and indicators",
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion"
      ],
      "description": "Attitudes toward the welfare state, redistribution, taxation, public services, and government responsibilities in economic and social domains."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2014 – Citizenship II",
      "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "2014",
      "geography": "International (multiple countries)",
      "themes": [
        "Cultural activities and participation",
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
        "Migration"
      ],
      "description": "Civic participation, social inclusion/exclusion, rights and responsibilities; includes items on citizenship that relate to migration and integration."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2013 – National Identity III",
      "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "2013",
      "geography": "International (multiple countries)",
      "themes": [
        "Migration",
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion"
      ],
      "description": "National identity, attitudes toward immigration and multiculturalism, belonging, and social cohesion."
    },
    {
      "title": "EVS 2017 – European Values Study Integrated Dataset (Wave 5)",
      "series": "European Values Study (EVS)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "2017",
      "geography": "International (Europe, multiple countries)",
      "themes": [
        "Employment",
        "Migration",
        "Cultural activities and participation",
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
        "Economic conditions and indicators"
      ],
      "description": "Cross-national survey on values and attitudes across Europe, including items on work, migration, cultural participation, inequality, and economic perceptions."
    },
    {
      "title": "EVS Longitudinal Data File 1981–2017",
      "series": "European Values Study (EVS)",
      "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
      "years": "1981–2017",
      "geography": "International (Europe, multiple countries)",
      "themes": [
        "Employment",
        "Migration",
        "Cultural activities and participation",
        "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
        "Economic conditions and indicators"
      ],
      "description": "Harmonized multi-wave EVS file enabling trend analysis of values related to employment, equality, migration, culture, and the economy from 1981 to 2017."
    }
  ]
}
